metadata.description: First-party Claude-format plugins published as individually installable skills and hooks.

plugins.name: commit-tools
plugins.description: Commit workflow skills for generating commit messages and splitting staged changes into logical commits.

plugins.name: project-advisor
plugins.description: Project analysis skills for recommending the highest-leverage next addition to the current repository.

plugins.name: refactor-tools
plugins.description: Refactoring and cleanup skills for safe, behavior-preserving code improvements.

plugins.name: block-package-managers
plugins.description: Block npm and npx terminal commands and redirect usage toward pnpm.

plugins.name: lint-and-format
plugins.description: Run pnpm format and pnpm lint after code-changing tools when package scripts exist.

plugins.name: caveman-mode
plugins.description: Inject switchable caveman-mode instructions and provide normal, ultra, and off skills.
